untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on calendar-based seasonal timing (late February entry for June natural gas futures) and external regime definition (SEASONAL_SUMMER_DEMAND) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Returns, Bar Properties). The core entry logic is 'time of year near end of February' which requires calendar/date logic not available in the indicator set. Additionally, SEASONAL_SUMMER_DEMAND is not in the ALLOWED_REGIMES list (only TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, HIGH_VOL, ANY are permitted).
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally calendar and fundamental-analysis driven rather than technical-indicator driven. It requires: (1) month/day detection for late February timing, (2) commodity futures contract expiration logic (June contracts), (3) external knowledge of seasonal power generation demand patterns. None of these can be expressed with the available technical indicators. To make this actionable, you would need: a date/calendar indicator, or a pre-computed seasonal factor indicator that captures power generation demand seasonality.
